name: DB Migration Reminder
description: When init.ts is edited, remind the agent that all table changes must be backward-compatible since init.ts uses CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS — existing columns are never dropped automatically

then.prompt: backend/src/db/init.ts was just edited. Remember: all CREATE TABLE statements use IF NOT EXISTS, so new columns added to existing tables will NOT be applied to an already-initialized database. If you added a new column to an existing table, also add an ALTER TABLE ... ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS statement after the CREATE TABLE block so existing databases get the column too.
